text.title: graph-rag-retrieval Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree that selects the retrieval path based on query-shape observables. Each branch names a concrete observable (when) and concludes with a reference to the rule from 01-core-rules.xml that owns that branch.

decision-tree.root-question: What canonical query type does the question match (after classifier returns)?

branch.conclusion: Read pre-computed summaries[global]; never trigger live traversal.
shortest_path between the two entities, depth-cap 3, wrap try/except.
Fall back to LOCAL vector search; mark fallback_used=true.
Lookup neighbors, then hybrid-expand candidates with vector + neighbor chunks.
Fall back to LOCAL vector search; mark fallback_used=true.
Run vector_store.search; optionally hybrid-expand if entities are extractable.
Skip graph-rag-retrieval; use plain vector + reranking.

example.description: For "How is Alice connected to Acme Corp?", classifier returns RELATIONSHIP; NER extracts {Alice, Acme Corp}; shortest_path runs depth-capped at 3 within try/except; conclusion ref r3 owns this path.
